description.short: Coaching nudges and action reminders from Boon
description.full:
Receive coaching nudges, action item reminders, goal check-ins, and session prep notifications directly in Microsoft Teams from your Boon coaching program.

In order to use this app, you need to have an active Boon Coaching account. Please visit https://www.boon-health.com/support or contact support@boon-health.com for more details.

Sign up: https://www.boon-health.com
Get started: https://www.boon-health.com/support
Contact us: support@boon-health.com
Help: https://www.boon-health.com/support
